title: Amazon Translate Translation Job
description: Schema representing an Amazon Translate batch translation job resource.

JobId.description: The ID of the translation job.

JobName.description: The user-provided name of the translation job.

JobStatus.description: The status of the translation job.

SourceLanguageCode.description: The language code of the source language.

TargetLanguageCodes.description: The language codes of the target languages.

InputDataConfig.description: The input data configuration for the translation job.

S3Uri.description: The URI of the S3 folder containing the input documents.

ContentType.description: The content type of the input documents.

OutputDataConfig.description: The output data configuration for the translation job.

S3Uri.description: The URI of the S3 folder for the output documents.

DataAccessRoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role for S3 access.

TerminologyNames.description: The names of custom terminologies applied to the job.

SubmittedTime.description: The time the translation job was submitted.

EndTime.description: The time the translation job ended.

Tags.description: A list of tags associated with the translation job.

Tag.description: A key-value pair for tagging resources.
